title: Non-Markovian Quantum Dynamics
description: Explore quantum dynamics with memory effects, going beyond the Markovian approximation to include environment backflow and information return.
learningObjectives: Understand the distinction between Markovian and non-Markovian dynamics
Identify signatures of non-Markovianity in quantum evolution
Model non-Markovian dynamics using memory kernels
Apply hierarchical equations of motion for structured environments
